rulings.Case Title: PETER ST. GEME et al VS. CHEVY CHASE BANK FSB, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Atty'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 26, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT CAPITAL ONE, N.A.,SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO CHEVY'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Atty'S Fees GRANTED. Defendant is entitled to $136,304 in attorney's fees. No evidence regarding attorney's fees incurred in connection with motion for attorney's fees was provided. = (501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: CLIFFORD JUNG VS. HON LAM YEUNG
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-12-842477 WITH CASE CGC-12-526785
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 26, 2013, line 5. PLAINTIFF CLIFFORD JUNG'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CSM-12-842477 WITH CASE CGC-12-526785 DENIED. Moving party failed to carry his burden to provide sufficient information regarding commonality of issues of law and fact. = (501/EHG)
